ModMetaData.name: Abyssal Protocol
ModMetaData.author: Neversalimus
ModMetaData.description:
A techno-demonic RimWorld endgame mod built around controlled summoning, abyssal progression, and boss-oriented encounter content.
Current public state: Pre-Alpha / First Vertical Slice.
Already implemented in the current public repository: - abyssal summoning infrastructure - Abyssal Summoning Circle and Abyssal Forge - early research, ritual crafting, and reward pipeline - Archon Sigil / Abyssal Residue progression foundation - custom hostile abyssal entities and portal-based escalation - first boss vertical slice with Archon Beast encounter logic - Rift Imp, Abyssal Imp Portal, and Rupture Portal content - early custom weapons and implant content - Herald progression content - Rupture Crown content, abilities, hediffs, and related presentation systems - custom code, textures, VFX-style assets, sounds, patches, and EN/RU localization
This is already a real playable vertical slice with dedicated systems and repository-backed content, not just a framework or concept mockup.
The mod is not content-complete yet: broader progression, more rituals, more enemies, more bosses, more gear tiers, and wider endgame reward structure are still in active development.
